name: mcp-server-aws-serverless
description: AI-powered tool for serverless development with AWS best practices and deployment guidance

rating.reason: Good overall documentation quality with comprehensive descriptions for most tools. Names are clear and purpose-specific. Most tools provide 2-4 sentence descriptions covering functionality, usage context, and key limitations. Parameter documentation is generally complete with clear types and constraints. Some inconsistencies exist - a few tools have overly verbose descriptions while others could benefit from more detail, and some parameter descriptions vary in depth. The toolset would benefit from more consistent formatting and slightly more concise descriptions in places, but overall provides solid guidance for users.
